source_pr.title: planner: remove deprecated incremental analyze feature
source_pr.body:
<!--

Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?
<!--

Please create an issue first to describe the problem.

There MUST be one line starting with "Issue Number:  " and 
linking the relevant issues via the "close" or "ref".

For more info, check https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/contribute-code.html#referring-to-an-issue.

-->

Issue Number: ref https://docs.pingcap.com/tidb/dev/release-7.3.0#deprecated-features

Problem Summary:

### What is changed and how it works?

Removed deprecated incremental analyze feature.

### Check List

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [x] Unit test
- [ ] Integration test
- [x] [Manual test](https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/pull/47544#issuecomment-1757073159)
- [ ] No need to test
  > - [ ] I checked and no code files have been changed.
  > <!-- Or your custom  "No need to test" reasons -->  

Side effects

- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more CPU
- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more Memory
- [ ] Breaking backward compatibility

Documentation

- [x] Affects user behaviors
- [ ] Contains syntax changes
- [ ] Contains variable changes
- [x] Contains experimental features
- [ ] Changes MySQL compatibility

### Release note

<!-- compatibility change, improvement, bugfix, and new feature need a release note -->

Please refer to [Release Notes Language Style Guide](https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/release-notes-style-guide.html) to write a quality release note.

```release-note
None
```

root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky due to concurrency races or unsynchronized shared state. Asynchronous state transitions need polling/Eventually-style checks. This PR stabilizes it by: race = "on",.

evidence: files: executor/BUILD.bazel, executor/analyze.go, executor/analyze_incremental.go, executor/analyze_test.go, executor/builder.go, executor/test/analyzetest/BUILD.bazel, executor/test/analyzetest/analyze_test.go, planner/core/common_plans.go, planner/core/integration_test.go, planner/core/planbuilder.go, statistics/BUILD.bazel, statistics/cmsketch.go, statistics/cmsketch_test.go, statistics/handle/handletest/analyze/BUILD.bazel, statistics/handle/handletest/analyze/analyze_test.go, statistics/integration_test.go

analysis:

Triage summary: race = "on",
Changed files (16): executor/BUILD.bazel, executor/analyze.go, executor/analyze_incremental.go, executor/analyze_test.go, executor/builder.go, executor/test/analyzetest/BUILD.bazel, executor/test/analyzetest/analyze_test.go, planner/core/common_plans.go, planner/core/integration_test.go, planner/core/planbuilder.go, statistics/BUILD.bazel, statistics/cmsketch.go, statistics/cmsketch_test.go, statistics/handle/handletest/analyze/BUILD.bazel, statistics/handle/handletest/analyze/analyze_test.go, statistics/integration_test.go
